_meta: Aetherion localization (B15, Decision Log #62). English pass happens in v0.4.4; keys without a translation fall back to id.json.
adv.locked_lv: The advanced path opens at Level %d.
adv.progress: Trial: %d/%d strong monsters felled without falling.
adv.ready: ⚔ Trial complete. Return to the Skill Master — your path forks.
adv.reset: You fell. The advanced trial resets to zero.
adv.title: ⚔ Advanced Path (Lv60)
auction.freed: 🔗 %s SET FREE — they will not forget this.
chest.already: You already opened this chest today.
dark.aided: The village breathes again. The %s eases — and people know who came.
dark.days_left: Expected to ease in %d days — or sooner, if someone helps.
dark.mood_distant_war: The war is far away, they say. All wars are far away — until they aren't.
dark.mood_drought: I draw twice as long for half a bucket. Don't ask about the harvest.
dark.mood_generic: Sorry — I'm not in the mood to talk. It's not your fault.
dark.mood_village_plague: My neighbour has had a fever for three days. I brought soup. I didn't go in.
enchant.protected: Failed... the Protection Scroll held the level at +%d.
greenhouse.built: 🏠 The Greenhouse stands. Seasons no longer limit your planting.
greenhouse.exists: A Greenhouse already stands on your Homestead.
quest.done: ✅ Quest complete: %s — claim it at the Board!
ritual.fail: The ritual failed... the key material survived. (+Insight)
ritual.title: Forging Ritual [%s]...
season.off: %s is out of season (%s) — it will grow slowly.
secret.found: ✦ SECRET ROOM FOUND — the world records it.
spirit.debt: The soil is still counting: %d more.
spirit.no_sapling: No Tree Sapling. Buy one, or fell trees more carefully.
spirit.not_here: Not here — plant it outside town, in the ground you wounded.
spirit.pale: The forest feels quiet. Its colour is fading.
tame.pact_only: Your orb bounces off. A creature like this is not captured — it CHOOSES. Return when the world knows who you are.
travel.depart: The gate trembles... safe travels, wanderer. → %s
travel.locked: You have never been there — the gate refuses.
travel.no_gold: Your purse refuses to travel — %d G short.
trial.chronicle: Trial of the Rasi passed under %s
trial.done: You already passed your Trial. The sky does not repeat itself.
trial.level: The Trial of the Rasi needs Level %d.
trial.passed: ✦ Trial of the Rasi passed. The %s constellation acknowledges you.
trial.title: Tried by %s
trial.wait: Your sign (%s) is not ascendant. This week: %s. Wait for the sky.
ui.keybind.conflict: That key is already used by: %s
ui.keybind.press: Press a new key for: %s  (ESC to cancel)
ui.settings.controls_hint: Click a binding to change it. ESC cancels. Gamepad works out of the box — glyphs follow the device you use.
ui.settings.language_note: Text switches instantly. Item & monster names follow in the next translation wave.
exp.softcap: The world has no higher foe to offer you. EXP shrinks — go DEEPER, not HIGHER.
